title: More functionality in the new workflow editor, plus it's becoming the default experience
description:
This release has two small improvements which means the New workflow editor can do everything that the old workflow editor could do. These changes are: You can set a name for your transitions when you create them, and rename existing transitions.
	When you change the name of a status that's included in a transition, the transition automatically updates to match the new name. And with those changes, the New Workflow Editor is a worthy successor to the old one, and we're excited for it to become t
